raw_consumer_statement:
The merchant ( XXXX ) submitted a refund of {$1700.00} on XX/XX/XXXX but it never landed in my account. Multiple attempts to resolve the issue has failed. The merchant would not reprocess the refund and kept insisting I check with the bank ( Citi ). I disputed the charge but they bank responded the merchant " will not honor the credit request ''. I submitted a copy of the refund receipt from XXXX to the bank but they just ignored it. 

The merchant then has tried to reimburse me via a taxable host payout, they said they can not refund back to the original payment method and insisting I fill out tax form online to receive the payout to my bank account. I am a guest trying to receive a refund not receive taxable income as a host. 

To date there has been no resolution from either the merchant or the bank to resolve getting that money back.
